name: Jiangsu Innovative Ecological New Materials Limited
summary: Jiangsu Innovative Ecological New Materials Limited, through its subsidiaries, develops, manufactures, and markets oil refining agents and fuel additives in China, Sudan, Chad, Niger, and Algeria. The company was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Yixing, the People's Republic of China. Jiangsu Innovative Ecological New Materials Limited is a subsidiary of Innovative Green Holdings Limited.
